name: Claude Opus 4.6
tagline: First Opus-class model with a 1M token context window (beta at launch).
metaDescription: Claude Opus 4.6 (Anthropic), released 2026-02-05 — part of the Claude Opus line. First Opus-class model with a 1M token context window (beta at launch). Improv…
overview: Claude Opus 4.6 is a large language model from Anthropic, part of the Claude Opus line. Released 2026-02-05. Anthropic's flagship Claude tier — most capable Opus-class model for the hardest reasoning, coding, and long-horizon agentic work.

What's notable in this version: First Opus-class model with a 1M token context window (beta at launch). Improved planning, larger-codebase reliability, code review and debugging; adaptive thinking recommended.
